creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
VPX module is disabled for FreeBSD in Config.kmk, so selecting "Video Capture" menu item results in "VERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED" error message.

Fix: Add FreeBSD in list of supported operating systems.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 1. Build and install virtualbox-ose with VPX and QT4 option set.
2. Start any virtual machine from GUI.
3. Select "Devices" -> "Video Capture".
